zh.Harlem, New York County, New York, Briti: 美國紐約州劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪哈萊姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cornelius B. Loosje於1596年2月出生在荷蘭藍德時，他的父親Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje27歲，母親Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen33歲。他於1615年與Anna Katerinia Kouk在荷蘭藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1657年5月1日在美國紐約州劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪哈萊姆享年61歲。

zh-hans.Harlem, New York County, New York, Briti: 美国纽约州劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪哈萊姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cornelius B. Loosje于1596年2月出生在荷兰藍德时，他的父亲Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje27岁，母亲Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen33岁。他于1615年与Anna Katerinia Kouk在荷兰藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1657年5月1日在美国纽约州劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪哈萊姆享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Loosje
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Loose in Kent or Suffolk, both named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’.
Flemish (De Loose) and Dutch: variant of Loos 3.

variants.name: Loos
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose or Loosey.
North German: from a short form of Nikolaus, German form of Nicholas .
Flemish and Dutch: nickname from the adjective loos ‘cunning, artful, guileful’.

variants.name: Losee
meanings: North German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose (see   Loose  ) or Loosey. This name was established in the Hudson valley in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Cornelius
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Roman family name, Cornélius, which is of uncertain origin, possibly a derivative of Latin cornu ‘horn’. This was the name of a 3rd-century pope who is venerated as a saint. The name was particularly popular in the Low Countries, and immigrants contributed to its frequency in the north of England from the 1400s. However, it is now seldom used in Britain.

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Cornelius B. Loosje was born in February 1596, in Zeeland, Netherlands, his father, Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje, was 27 and his mother, Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, was 33. He married Anna Katerinia Kouk in 1615, in Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 May 1657, in Harlem, New York County, New York, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cornelius B. Loosje est né en février 1596, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anna Katerinia Kouk en 1615, à Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1657, à Harlem, New York County, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.Harlem, New York County, New York, Briti: Harlem, New York County, New York, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Cornelius B. Loosje im Februar 1596 in Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje 27 und seine Mutter Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen 33. Er hat 1615 in Seeland, Niederlande Anna Katerinia Kouk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1657 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Harlem, New York County, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelius B. Loosje è nato il nel febbraio 1596 nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anna Katerinia Kouk nel 1615, nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 maggio 1657, nel Harlem, New York County, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cornelius B. Loosjeが1596年2月にオランダゼエランドで生まれた時，父Henri Jacobus Losea Loosjeは27歳，母Majaretta Gertstad Van Essenは33歳であった。1615年にオランダゼエランドでAnna Katerinia Koukと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年5月1日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク コウントイハーレムで61歳で死去した。

ko.Harlem, New York County, New York, Briti: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 카운티 하를렘
ko.lifeSummary: Cornelius B. Loosje(이)가 1596년 2월 네덜란드 제랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1615년 네덜란드 제랜드에서 Anna Katerinia Kouk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1657년 5월 1일 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 카운티 하를렘에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelius B. Loosje nasceu em fevereiro de 1596, em Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Katerinia Kouk em 1615, em Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1657, em Harlem, New York County, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.Harlem, New York County, New York, Briti: харлем, ню ерк коунти, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cornelius B. Loosje родился февраль 1596 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Katerinia Kouk в 1615 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 мая 1657 г. в местности харлем, ню ерк коунти, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cornelius B. Loosje nació en febrero de 1596, en Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anna Katerinia Kouk en 1615, en Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1657, en Harlem, New York County, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años.
